text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
U-ugh, I can't move! I'm totally defenseless
against the powers of evil right now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Pull yourself together, Biko! Want me to give you
a piggyback ride?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Anything but that! A hero always walks on her
own two feet!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: No matter the crisis... or danger...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ☆ That was my Japanese and Western
fusion full course meal! ☆ I'm so happy you
cleaned every single plate!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It was a homemade present from you, so of
course I'd finish it! A hero would never leave
leftovers!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I almost forgot about the chocolate ice
cream cake I made. It should have cooled down
by now, so let's take it out and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Th-there's still more?! U-ugh... I won't fall here!
